prompt: Review the features for the cloud-services product in the T-Systems project. Every feature is missing product_slug, taxonomy_mapping, and readiness fields. Ensure every feature has all required fields including product_slug, taxonomy_mapping (with dimension, category_id, category_name from the b2b-ict taxonomy), and readiness. Fix all structural gaps and write the corrected feature files.

assertions.text: All required fields present (slug, product_slug, name, description)
taxonomy_mapping present with dimension, category_id, category_name
readiness is one of ga, beta, planned
